column1: # Sentence patterns — productive grammar that attaches to a verb/noun/clause.
# Belongs here: bound patterns shown with a 〜 placeholder (〜たい, 〜べき,
# 〜ように, 〜はず, modality 〜らしい/〜ようだ) and core function words (だ, という).
# Te-form patterns (〜ている, 〜てしまう…) live in te-form.tsv; conjugation
# paradigms of a part of speech live in their own conjugation/ decks; idiomatic
